basic_details.job_title: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Workers Recruitment 2026 - 30 Posts, Apply Offline by 31 July
basic_details.organization_name: Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag, Jal Shakti Division Fatehpur
basic_details.total_vacancies: Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, Multipurpose Worker
basic_details.short_information: Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag, through Jal Shakti Division Fatehpur (Tehsil Fatehpur, District Kangra), has invited applications for 30 Para Worker posts - Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, and Multipurpose Worker - on a part-time/hourly basis for the operation and maintenance of Water Supply and Irrigation Schemes. This is Recruitment Notice No. EE/JSD/FTR/EA-I/Recruitment of Para Workers/2026-3102-08, dated 13 July 2026. Applications must reach the Executive Engineer's office by 31 July 2026, 5:00 PM.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years. Maximum age: 45 years. Age is calculated as on 31 July 2026. This age criterion applies to all three posts - Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, and Multipurpose Worker.

qualification.details: The candidate should have a minimum qualification of matriculation (10th) with a certificate in the trade of Electrician/Wireman/Diesel mechanic/Pump mechanic/Motor mechanic/Pump operator cum mechanic from a recognized ITI, or matriculation (10th) with a certificate in the above-cited trades under the Skill Development scheme of the Government. | The candidate should have a minimum qualification of matriculation (10th) with an ITI certificate in the trade of Fitter from a recognized ITI institute, or matriculation (10th) with a certificate in the above-cited trade under the Skill Development scheme of the Government. | The candidate should have a minimum qualification of Middle (8th) Pass or its equivalent from a school duly recognized by the State Government.

salary_details.details: Para Pump Operator: ₹7,100 per month Para Fitter: ₹7,100 per month Multipurpose Worker: ₹6,000 per month | Working hours for the selected incumbent shall be 6 hours per day.

selection_process: Criteria Para Pump Operator Para Fitter Multipurpose Worker
Percentage of marks/grades in Matriculation (for Para P.O. & Para Fitter) or Middle/8th Class (for Multipurpose Worker) 5 Marks 5 Marks 6 Marks
BPL family having income as prescribed from time to time 1 Mark 1 Mark Not applicable

Experience in related field with IPH(JSV)/HPPWD/CPWD/PSUs or an authorized outsourcing agency in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag (certificate from EE(JSV) required; half mark for every six months) 2 Marks 2 Marks 2 Marks
Skill test and physical test (Para Pump Operator/Para Fitter); physical test only (Multipurpose Worker) 2 Marks 2 Marks 2 Marks
Total 10 Marks 10 Marks 10 Marks
The total selection process is based on 10 marks
distributed as follows:

Initial merit is drawn up based on the experience and qualification of the candidate as per the notified criteria. The top eligible candidates (approximately 3 times the number of vacancies) will be called for the skill/physical test through a separate call letter. No TA/DA will be payable to applicants for appearing in the skill and physical test.
Experience must be in the related field of IPH/HPPWD/CPWD/PSUs or an outsourcing agency providing service in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag
supported by a certificate issued by the EE(JSV).

For Para Pump Operator: related field is operation and maintenance of pumping machinery and allied electrical installation of Rural Water Supply Schemes/Irrigation Schemes. For Para Fitter: related field is maintaining in-village piped water supply infrastructure or the distribution system of Rural Water Supply/Irrigation Schemes.
Minor repair of pumps; basic knowledge of locating and replacing faulty or damaged parts. Knowledge of test pressure
leakages
and adjustments for appropriate water yield. Knowledge of pump installation and alignment to motor using basic tools. Ability to locate faults in electric system and motor. Ability to dismantle
remove
and replace worn-out parts
including greasing and oiling of moving parts. Knowledge of pump lubrication and cooling system. Ability to operate regulating valves and control mechanism of the pumping system.
Ability to repair water supply pipelines
arrest leakage
and add or abandon connections. Basic knowledge of pipe fitting
sizes
operation
and maintenance. Ability to cut threads on pipes using ratchet and die sets
and fit specials using basic tools. Knowledge of village water supply infrastructure and pipe distribution layout
including flow regulation techniques in hilly terrain. Knowledge of tools used for pipe fitting and operating skills. Behavioral skills in handling grievances
complaints
and conflict resolution.
Candidate should be capable of carrying tools and pipes in hilly areas. Candidate should not have any physical disabilities or colour blindness.
how_to_apply: Fill the application form neatly, either typed or handwritten, in English or Hindi.
Attach self-attested copies of all relevant supporting documents listed above.
Mention your mobile number (if any) in the application form.
Send/submit the completed application to the Office of the Executive Engineer, Jal Shakti Division, Fatehpur, Distt. Kangra, H.P. 176053.
Ensure the application reaches the office on or before 31 July 2026, up to 5:00 PM. Applications received after the last date, or found incomplete, will be rejected.
Shortlisted candidates (approximately 3 times the number of vacancies) will receive a separate call letter for the skill/physical test.
important_instructions: These posts are purely part-time/hourly basis engagements for operation and maintenance of Water Supply/Irrigation Schemes. No TA/DA will be paid to applicants for appearing in the skill and physical test. The working hours for the selected incumbent shall be 6 hours per day. Selected Para Pump Operators/Para Fitters must submit a quarterly self-reporting format to the concerned Junior Engineer; a consolidated annual report is prepared for community certification of satisfactory work and conduct. Unsatisfactory performance may lead to termination, but only after at least 3 notices have been served on the incumbent, with written reasons countersigned by the concerned Assistant Engineer. Multipurpose Worker candidates must compulsorily attach a detailed marks sheet of the middle standard; if not issued by the Education Board, a detailed marks certificate from the school Principal is required. Shortlisting is based only on Middle standard marks, even if a higher qualification is held. Selected candidates will be deputed/engaged on schemes already outsourced to firms/contractors. Requests for transfer from the scheme will not be accepted at a later stage.

content_sections.heading: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Recruitment 2026: Overview

rows.details: Himachal Pradesh Jal Shakti Vibhag, Jal Shakti Division Fatehpur
Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, Multipurpose Worker
Part-time/hourly basis, operation and maintenance of Water Supply/Irrigation Schemes

content_sections.heading: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Important Dates
HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Workers Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 30 posts have been notified across three categories of Para Workers.

content_sections.heading: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: The candidate should have a minimum qualification of matriculation (10th) with a certificate in the trade of Electrician/Wireman/Diesel mechanic/Pump mechanic/Motor mechanic/Pump operator cum mechanic from a recognized ITI, or matriculation (10th) with a certificate in the above-cited trades under the Skill Development scheme of the Government. The candidate should have a minimum qualification of matriculation (10th) with an ITI certificate in the trade of Fitter from a recognized ITI institute, or matriculation (10th) with a certificate in the above-cited trade under the Skill Development scheme of the Government. The candidate should have a minimum qualification of Middle (8th) Pass or its equivalent from a school duly recognized by the State Government.

content_sections.heading: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum age: 18 years. Maximum age: 45 years. Age is calculated as on 31 July 2026. This age criterion applies to all three posts - Para Pump Operator, Para Fitter, and Multipurpose Worker.

content_sections.heading: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Honorarium/Salary
content_sections.text: Para Pump Operator: ₹7,100 per month Para Fitter: ₹7,100 per month Multipurpose Worker: ₹6,000 per month Working hours for the selected incumbent shall be 6 hours per day.

content_sections.heading: HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Application Fee
HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Selection Process
content_sections.text: The total selection process is based on 10 marks, distributed as follows: Initial merit is drawn up based on the experience and qualification of the candidate as per the notified criteria. The top eligible candidates (approximately 3 times the number of vacancies) will be called for the skill/physical test through a separate call letter. No TA/DA will be payable to applicants for appearing in the skill and physical test. Experience must be in the related field of IPH/HPPWD/CPWD/PSUs or an outsourcing agency providing service in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag, supported by a certificate issued by the EE(JSV). For Para Pump Operator: related field is operation and maintenance of pumping machinery and allied electrical installation of Rural Water Supply Schemes/Irrigation Schemes. For Para Fitter: related field is maintaining in-village piped water supply infrastructure or the distribution system of Rural Water Supply/Irrigation Schemes. Minor repair of pumps; basic knowledge of locating and replacing faulty or damaged parts. Knowledge of test pressure, leakages, and adjustments for appropriate water yield. Knowledge of pump installation and alignment to motor using basic tools. Ability to locate faults in electric system and motor. Ability to dismantle, remove, and replace worn-out parts, including greasing and oiling of moving parts. Knowledge of pump lubrication and cooling system. Ability to operate regulating valves and control mechanism of the pumping system. Ability to repair water supply pipelines, arrest leakage, and add or abandon connections. Basic knowledge of pipe fitting, sizes, operation, and maintenance. Ability to cut threads on pipes using ratchet and die sets, and fit specials using basic tools. Knowledge of village water supply infrastructure and pipe distribution layout, including flow regulation techniques in hilly terrain. Knowledge of tools used for pipe fitting and operating skills. Behavioral skills in handling grievances, complaints, and conflict resolution. Candidate should be capable of carrying tools and pipes in hilly areas. Candidate should not have any physical disabilities or colour blindness.

rows.criteria: Percentage of marks/grades in Matriculation (for Para P.O. & Para Fitter) or Middle/8th Class (for Multipurpose Worker)
BPL family having income as prescribed from time to time
Experience in related field with IPH(JSV)/HPPWD/CPWD/PSUs or an authorized outsourcing agency in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag (certificate from EE(JSV) required; half mark for every six months)
Skill test and physical test (Para Pump Operator/Para Fitter); physical test only (Multipurpose Worker)

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Workers Recruitment
content_sections.text: Bonafide Himachali certificate Character Certificate issued by Tehsildar Matriculation Certificate showing detail of marks obtained Relevant ITI Skill Development certificate Proof of age BPL Certificate (if any) Experience certificate (as per criteria above) SC/ST/OBC/EWS Certificate issued by competent authority, as per HP Government notifications issued from time to time Bonafide Himachali certificate Character Certificate issued by Tehsildar Middle (8th Class) Certificate showing detail of marks obtained Proof of age BPL Certificate (if any) Experience certificate (as per criteria above) SC/ST/OBC/EWS Certificate issued by competent authority, as per HP Government notifications issued from time to time Affidavit regarding percentage/marks of 8th class - misappropriation will lead to legal action and termination of the candidate at any stage

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Workers Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Fill the application form neatly, either typed or handwritten, in English or Hindi. Attach self-attested copies of all relevant supporting documents listed above. Mention your mobile number (if any) in the application form. Send/submit the completed application to the Office of the Executive Engineer, Jal Shakti Division, Fatehpur, Distt. Kangra, H.P. 176053. Ensure the application reaches the office on or before 31 July 2026, up to 5:00 PM. Applications received after the last date, or found incomplete, will be rejected. Shortlisted candidates (approximately 3 times the number of vacancies) will receive a separate call letter for the skill/physical test.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: These posts are purely part-time/hourly basis engagements for operation and maintenance of Water Supply/Irrigation Schemes. No TA/DA will be paid to applicants for appearing in the skill and physical test. The working hours for the selected incumbent shall be 6 hours per day. Selected Para Pump Operators/Para Fitters must submit a quarterly self-reporting format to the concerned Junior Engineer; a consolidated annual report is prepared for community certification of satisfactory work and conduct. Unsatisfactory performance may lead to termination, but only after at least 3 notices have been served on the incumbent, with written reasons countersigned by the concerned Assistant Engineer. Multipurpose Worker candidates must compulsorily attach a detailed marks sheet of the middle standard; if not issued by the Education Board, a detailed marks certificate from the school Principal is required. Shortlisting is based only on Middle standard marks, even if a higher qualification is held. Selected candidates will be deputed/engaged on schemes already outsourced to firms/contractors. Requests for transfer from the scheme will not be accepted at a later stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Workers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must reach the Office of the Executive Engineer, Jal Shakti Division, Fatehpur by 31 July 2026, up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Workers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 30 vacancies in total: 8 Para Pump Operator, 3 Para Fitter, and 19 Multipurpose Worker posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the honorarium for Para Pump Operator and Para Fitter in this recruitment?
faq.answer: Para Pump Operator and Para Fitter posts carry an honorarium of ₹7,100 per month, while Multipurpose Worker posts carry ₹6,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. Is there a written exam for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No written exam is mentioned. Selection is based on a 10-mark merit criteria (academic percentage, BPL status, and experience), followed by a skill/physical test for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Can I apply online for HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Workers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. The notification specifies an offline process - the application form must be typed or handwritten and submitted physically to the Executive Engineer's office.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Workers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 45 years of age, as on 31 July 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for HP Jal Shakti Vibhag Para Workers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must reach the Office of the Executive Engineer, Jal Shakti Division, Fatehpur by 31 July 2026, up to 5:00 PM.
